inputs.text: Main thakawat mehsoos kar raha hoon, bukhar bhi hai aur sir dard hai

inputs.text: Ab mere bukhar bahut tez ho gaya hai, kabz ke baad dast ho raha hai aur main bahut kamzor mehsoos kar raha hoon

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: The combination of high fever, diarrhea after constipation, and severe weakness is highly suggestive of typhoid fever

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Gastroenteritis can cause diarrhea, but the pattern and severity here point more towards typhoid

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Malaria can cause fever, but the other symptoms don't fit as well as they do for typhoid

inputs.text: Main abhi bhi bahut thakawat mehsoos kar raha hoon, bukhar abhi tak bajaye hue hai aur pet dard bhi badh gaya hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: The persistence of high fever, worsening abdominal pain, and signs of intestinal involvement confirm the diagnosis of typhoid fever

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the specific pattern of symptoms and signs pointing towards typhoid

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out as the symptoms and signs do not align with malaria
